Class WebViewHostCapabilityBridge

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora.Shell
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Runtime host capability bridge with policy-first deterministic execution semantics.

public sealed class WebViewHostCapabilityBridge

WebViewHostCapabilityBridge(IWebViewHostCapabilityProvider, IWebViewHostCapabilityPolicy?, WebViewHostCapabilityBridgeOptions?)

Create bridge with provider, optional authorization policy and boundary options.

Raised when a typed capability call is completed with deterministic outcome metadata.
